## Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should it work? Include mockups/diagrams if helpful -->

## User Story
```
As a [type of user]
I want [goal]
So that [benefit]
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other solutions did you consider? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or references -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I've read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
